title: What is Python?
description: Learn the world's most popular programming language

scenes.speech: Let's dive into the world of Python with Garuchan!
scenes.title: What is Python?

scenes.speech: Python is the world's most popular programming language!
scenes.title: What is Python?
scenes.content: Python is used in AI, data science, and web development. It's simple, readable, and perfect for beginners!

scenes.speech: Knowing Python opens doors to the future!
scenes.title: Why Learn Python?
scenes.content: Google, Instagram, NASA, YouTube — they all use Python. It's the standard language for AI development with top global demand!

scenes.speech: Let's set up the environment first!
scenes.title: Setting Up Python
scenes.content: Download from python.org and install VS Code or PyCharm. Or use Google Colab — free, runs in your browser!
scenes.highlight: 🆓 Google Colab → Start right now in browser!

scenes.title: Your First Code
scenes.content: print('Hello, World!') — that's it! One line and the program runs. This is Python's charm!

scenes.title: Comments and Indentation
scenes.content: Write comments with # and use 4 spaces for indentation. In Python, indentation is part of the grammar — very important!
scenes.highlight:
# Comment → explains the code
Indent → shows structure

scenes.speech: What can you make with Python?
scenes.title: What Can You Build?
scenes.content: Web services, AI/machine learning, data analysis, automation scripts, games… the possibilities are endless!

scenes.speech: Python has a huge global community!
scenes.title: Python Community
scenes.content: Stack Overflow, GitHub, PyPI (packages)… the world's largest programming community is there to help!

scenes.title: Your Learning Roadmap
scenes.content: Basic syntax → Data structures → Functions → Libraries → Projects. Advance step by step!
